messages.subject: [hp-q6d] Daily provider budget exhausted - swarm halted
messages.body_md: Today's provider spend across all CAAM accounts crossed the configured daily cap (USD 500). watch-safety-thresholds emitted swarm.halt immediately without waking an LLM; NTM reports the swarm halted and GreenBear paused.
